## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:

- Change to min_area_limiter_scale: 0.0001, turb_conv_param_vec: [0.0001, 10000] except for calibrated ones
- Unify some tomls, remove unused ones

title: clean up edmf tomls
